SessionStart.description: Load morning context: calendar events, task priorities, and unread message count

PreToolUse.command: echo '⚠️ DRAFT POLICY: This action would send a message directly. Please create a draft instead.'
PreToolUse.description: Prevent direct sending — enforce draft-only policy

PostToolUse.command: echo '📝 Draft created. Please review before sending manually.'
PostToolUse.description: Confirm draft creation and remind to review

Stop.description: Save session summary and pending action items
